MergePosition.description:
Controls where an overlay onDrift entry is placed relative to Origin-generated entries
during Asset overlay merge.

description:
An entry in `on_drift`. Pairs a Conditions reference with a Sync reference.
The conditions are evaluated as a group (all must pass for no drift).

conditions.description: Name of the `kind: Conditions` resource whose conditions define drift.

mergePosition.description: Controls insertion position during overlay merge. Not included in compiled output.

sync.description: Name of the Sync resource to execute when drift is detected.

with.description: Template variables passed to the Sync and Conditions resources for argument interpolation.

title: OnDriftEntry
